unit.deleteTopicMessage: This topic will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

profile.noSubjects: You're not following any subjects yet
profile.privacyDesc: Control what information other users can see about you.
profile.name: Name
profile.nameDesc: Your name visible next to your avatar.
profile.usernameDesc: Your Telegram @ on your public profile.
profile.notifDesc: The bot sends you a message when applicable. Times are in Argentina time (ART).
profile.dailyReminderDesc: Reminds you if you haven't studied yet at your chosen time.
profile.streakAtRiskDesc: Alerts you at 21:00 ART if your streak is in danger.
profile.dueFlashcardsDesc: Notifies you at 09:00 ART if you have cards to review.
profile.deleteExplain: Your progress, flashcards, followed subjects and all data will be deleted. Next time you open the app you'll start from scratch.

flashcards.title: Flashcards & Spaced Repetition
flashcards.content: The system shows you each card at the exact moment before you'd forget it. The better you answer, the longer until it appears again. This way you memorize long-term without reviewing everything each time.

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.content: Multiple choice questions about each unit's content. They help you identify what you know and what you don't. Answer all to have it counted in your progress.

progress.title: How progress is calculated
progress.content: A unit's progress combines: dominated flashcards, answered questions, viewed PDFs and viewed infographics. A subject's progress is the average of all its units.

privacyHelp.title: Privacy
privacyHelp.content: You control exactly what others see. Your name, photo, username, subjects and progress can each be hidden independently. Change it anytime from this screen.

streak.title: Study streak
streak.content: A study day is recorded each time you open a unit, answer flashcards, complete a quiz or view an infographic or PDF. If you don't study one day, the streak resets to zero.

zonaLibre.title: FREE ZONE
zonaLibre.subtitle: Free files
zonaLibre.beFirst: Be the first to upload something.
zonaLibre.capacity90: Free Zone is almost full... enjoy it while it lasts 👁
zonaLibre.defaultBanner: Nobody can delete this. Files here live on the TON network — no servers, no censorship.
zonaLibre.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum 50MB per file.
zonaLibre.uploadSuccess: File on the network! Nobody can delete it now.
zonaLibre.tonStatusOk: Files are uploaded correctly to TON Storage and receive a unique Bag ID on the TON network.
zonaLibre.tonStatusWarning: The current node runs on Railway, which does not expose UDP ports. The TON network cannot connect directly to this node, so files are not yet visible in external explorers like Bag Explorer.
zonaLibre.tonStatusFuture: When the app grows, the node will migrate to a server with a public IP and open ports — there the files will be truly decentralized and immortal on the TON network.

zlOnboarding.slide2: Online, any file can disappear. A server goes down, someone censors it, a link breaks.
zlOnboarding.slide3: Here it's different. Files you upload travel to the TON network — thousands of nodes worldwide store them.
zlOnboarding.slide4: Nobody can delete them. Not me, not DaathApp, not any government. They're yours forever.
zlOnboarding.slide5: One rule: respect the community. You can report inappropriate content. I'll handle the rest.

onboarding.chooseLanguageDesc: Before we start, pick your language. You can change it later in your profile.
onboarding.introDesc: Before we start, let us show you how it works and let you choose what to share with others.
onboarding.appDesc: DaathApp has everything you need to study better.
onboarding.privacyDesc: Choose what information other users can see about you. You can change it anytime from your profile.
onboarding.privacyNote: This applies to your presence in the followers list of subjects and your public profile.
onboarding.profilePhotoDesc: Your photo appears in the followers list of each subject.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.nameDesc: Your name is shown next to your avatar.
onboarding.usernameDesc: Your Telegram handle visible on your public profile.
onboarding.subjectsYouFollowDesc: Others can see what subjects you're following.
onboarding.progressToggleDesc: Your completion percentage visible on your profile.
onboarding.allSetDesc: You've configured your privacy. You can change it anytime from your profile.
onboarding.followSubject: Follow a subject in Study to start studying.
onboarding.flashcardsDesc: Review with spaced repetition — the system shows each card at the right moment so you remember long-term.
onboarding.quizzesDesc: Multiple choice questions generated from each unit's content. Great for reviewing before an exam.
onboarding.infographicsAndPdfsDesc: All unit material in one place, organized and always available.
onboarding.realProgressDesc: Track your progress by subject and unit. Every action adds to your progress.
onboarding.studyStreakDesc: Study every day to keep your streak active. The more consistent, the better.
onboarding.helloRedo: Hello {{name}}, I'm Redo. Your AI-powered study companion.
onboarding.redoAiDesc: I can explain topics, generate flashcards and analyze your progress to tell you exactly what to review.
onboarding.redoDragDemo: Drag me over any subject and I'll tell you all about it.
onboarding.redoPrivacy: Your profile is public by default. Choose what you want others to see.
onboarding.redoNotifications: I can notify you via Telegram so you don't lose your rhythm.
onboarding.redoFinal: I'm in beta and I learn with you. Shall we start, {{name}}?
onboarding.aiExplainTopics: Explain any topic from your subjects
onboarding.aiAnalyzeProgress: Analyze your progress and suggest reviews
onboarding.privacyChangeNote: You can change it later in Profile → Settings
onboarding.dailyReminderDesc: I'll notify you at 08:00 if you haven't studied
onboarding.streakAtRiskDesc: Alert at 21:00 to keep your streak
onboarding.dueFlashcardsDesc: Notification at 09:00 if you have reviews
